tools.name: createPolicy
tools.description: Create a new access control policy with a name and description.

tools.name: getPolicy
tools.description: Get a policy by ID with all rules and metadata.

tools.name: archivePolicy
tools.description: Archive a policy, removing it from active use while preserving history.

tools.name: clonePolicy
tools.description: Clone a policy with all its rules into a new draft policy.

tools.name: addRule
tools.description: Add an access control rule to a policy specifying resource, action, and effect.

tools.name: deleteRule
tools.description: Delete a rule from a policy.

tools.name: testRule
tools.description: Test whether a specific resource/action combination would be allowed for a user.

tools.name: assignPolicy
tools.description: Assign a policy to a user, team, or role.

tools.name: listAssignments
tools.description: List all policy assignments with optional filtering by policy or target.

tools.name: checkAccess
tools.description: Check whether a user has access to perform an action on a resource.

tools.name: getPolicyVersions
tools.description: Get the version history of a policy.

tools.name: compareVersions
tools.description: Compare two versions of a policy to see what rules changed.

tools.name: rollbackPolicy
tools.description: Rollback a policy to a previous version.
